creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 244829
security/rhash: update to 1.4.4 and fix build with lld 17

> so is that "interesting" enough for putting in a new release?
Yeah, you've convinced me, let's go with the update, esp. given that the difference is basically the number of patches, i.e. minuscule.

> Shall I commit the version with just the one patch?
No, please go ahead with the update to 1.4.4, just make sure it does not break consumers (most importantly, `devel/cmake-core'), thank you!
